title: selaginella schatteburgiana
intro: Selaginella schatteburgiana, also known as Schatteburg's spikemoss, is a species of plants in the genus Selaginella, which belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Selaginella schatteburgiana include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which are believed to provide relief from various health issues, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
